ribbon.title: Conferences
ribbon.description: Explore our distinguished conference contributions that highlight pioneering research, collaborative innovation, and the global impact of our work in computational multiphysics and interdisciplinary scientific advancements.

Conferences.title: Investigation of Compressive and Interlaminar Fracture Properties of GF/Acrylic Thermoplastic Composites Under Sea Water Ageing Effect

Conferences.journal: BSSM, 18th International Conference on Advances in Experimental Mechanics, September 2024 at University of Liverpool, UK.

Conferences.title: Two-step homogenization of 8-harness satin weave woven composite considering void defects
Conferences.journal: 14th International Conference on Textile Composites (TexComp14), 14th -16th September 2022, at Kyoto Institute of Technology, Kyoto, Japan.

Conferences.title: Thermo-mechanical modeling of 3D woven fabric composites using two-step homogenization approach
Conferences.journal: In ASME International Mechanical Engineering Congress and Exposition (IMECE2019), American Society of Mechanical Engineers, 11th to 14th November 2019 at Salt Lake City, Utah, USA.

Conferences.title: Thermo-mechanical modelling of 5-harness satin weave C/C composites at high temperature
Conferences.journal: 9th ICMPC-2019, 8th -10th March 2019 at Gokaraju Rangaraju Institute of Engineering and Technology, Hyderabad, 2019.
